_doc: Currently-active model IDs that the deprecation parser pulls in as false positives. Provider deprecation pages list active models in 'Recommended Replacement' columns and status-table 'Active' rows; my row-scoped parser can't always tell columns apart, so we subtract this whitelist from the parsed denylist on every run. Keep short. Drop entries here as they deprecate (the deprecation check will then fail when they're cited in code).
